visual_description: A man with short hair wearing a dark leather jacket stands in a dimly lit eatery, initially facing away from the camera. He picks up a small white bowl from a table and examines it while holding a spoon. He then walks across the room, passing a wall with posters and a black bag on a table, looking ahead.
